summary_one_line: Input must drive the mime/userheaders code path so part->userheaders is a non-NULL curl_slist when search_header iterates it.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: Input must contain the literal protocol selector bytes that route the fuzz harness into the mime/SMTP-userheader code path (e.g. the `pop3` token at offsets 0x06-0x09 plus the framing/length fields at 0x00-0x05 and 0x1c-0x20), so the caller Curl_mime_prepare_headers receives a non-NULL part->userheaders list and the for-loop body at line 350 actually executes.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry the exact 4-byte literal `pop3` at offsets 0x06-0x09 and consistent framing bytes (00 01 00 00 00 19 at 0x00-0x05; 0x47 = 'G' at offset 0x24), and the per-role overlay shows line 351 (match_header call) hit only by W with 48 invocations of match_header in W vs 0 in L.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds (all from naive) have scrambled bytes at the same offsets (no concentrated `pop3` literal; offset 0x06 has 70(p)x7 6f(o)x1 2d(-)x1 64(d)x1 and offset 0x09 has 33(3)x6 plus three other values), so the protocol-selection CMPs in the harness reject these inputs and the mime/userheader chain is never reached; consequently hdrlist is NULL at line 350 and the loop body never runs (T=0 hits in L at the blocker).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: The pair delta is I2SRandReplace: value_profile_cmplog adds the cmplog CMP buffer and the I2SRandReplace mutator on top of value_profile's existing instrumentation. The harness compares the input prefix against fixed protocol literals like `pop3`; I2SRandReplace reads those operands out of the CMP buffer and substitutes them into the input verbatim, materializing the multi-byte literal in a single mutation. Without I2SRandReplace, value_profile must synthesize the 4-byte equality match by blind havoc, since prefix-distance feedback is all-or-nothing on the literal.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the for-loop predicate in search_header at mime.c:350, blocked side T (loop body).
The blocker source line is the for-loop that iterates the user-headers list.
Only the value_profile_cmplog > value_profile (I2S) pair is decisive at this branch; cmplog and naive are reference fuzzers.
Winner resolves every trial; loser blocks every trial — prob_div is 1.00.
Line 351 (the body that calls match_header) is hit only by winner-resolving seeds.
search_header is called from Curl_mime_prepare_headers with part->userheaders as hdrlist, so a NULL userheaders list keeps the loop body unentered.
match_header was invoked 48 times under the W seed set and 0 times under L — winner builds and walks a non-empty userheaders list while loser never gets there.
At the blocker line, W took the true side 48 times and false 60; L took true 0 times — the loop body is the diverging side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 350  T=48 F=60  T=0 F=60  for(; !value && hdrlist; hdrlist = hdrlist->next)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: All five winner-resolving seeds contain the literal `pop3` token at offsets 0x06-0x09 (concentrated `33(3)x10` at 0x09).
Winner-resolving seeds tend to carry SMTP-style header bytes (`GFrom: me@` substring) at offsets 0x24+, the userheaders payload that populates part->userheaders.
value_profile_cmplog has I2SRandReplace as part of its mutator set on top of CMP_MAP gradient.
value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace; it has only edge feedback + CMP_MAP gradient + havoc/token mutators.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 225 --role W --fuzzer cmplog --trial 1 --seed 039ae17b8f83392b`; the ancestor chain has 10 recorded levels and the trailing 'I2S-floor signal' line reports exactly one dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 9. Per fuzzer_mechanism_library.md cmplog/vpc sections, dash rows are exclusive to cmplog and value_profile_cmplog under the current LibAFL build and indicate an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find (lower-bound floor). Cmplog (REFERENCE here) resolves 10/10, and the decisive vpc-vs-vp pair shares the same I2S delta, so this lineage corroborates the I2SRandReplace attribution for the decisive pair as well.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness whose only gate to the search_header loop is an equality CMP on a multi-byte literal should reproduce the vpc > vp gap at MAGIC_BYTES = 4 but eliminate it at MAGIC_BYTES = 1; if value_profile resolves at MAGIC_BYTES = 4 as quickly as value_profile_cmplog (i.e. CMP_MAP gradient alone clears a 4-byte equality), the I2SRandReplace attribution is wrong.

weakest_evidence_point: The I2S-floor verification was run against a cmplog (REFERENCE) seed because that is what the BRANCH SEEDS section stores for this branch; I have not directly inspected a value_profile_cmplog lineage on this branch (no vpc seed was stored by seed_bisect), so the I2SRandReplace attribution for the actual decisive pair vpc>vp is inferred from the shared I2S delta and matching mechanism context rather than verified on a vpc winning seed.
